notes: Threats are meeples spawned onto the board by Gravity cards. While present they impose an ongoing per-Upkeep penalty until cleared by the listed `cleared_by` card at the threat's space, OR until their `max_ticks` countdown expires and the room moves on. The countdown is the visible counter — every threat carries a number that ticks down each Upkeep so the threat is bounded.

faith_mess.title: FAITH MADE A MESS
faith_mess.flavor: Wet patch on the floor where Faith was lying. She's not even embarrassed about it.
faith_mess.spawn_message: Faith leaves a wet patch where she was lying.
faith_mess.expired_message: The patch dries on its own. The room moves on.

bathroom_funk.title: THE BATHROOM NEEDS CLEANING
bathroom_funk.flavor: The light in there is buzzing wrong, and somebody left the tap on.
bathroom_funk.spawn_message: Something in the bathroom turns on the smell.
bathroom_funk.cleared_message: Bleach, paper, twenty seconds. The room remembers being a room.
bathroom_funk.expired_message: Whatever was wrong in there sorts itself out. The door swings shut.

river_miasma.title: MIASMA · THE RIVER WINDOW
river_miasma.flavor: A green-grey haze pressed against the window. Smells like turned earth.
river_miasma.spawn_message: The river window fogs over from the outside.
river_miasma.cleared_message: You wipe the inside. The fog stays outside where fog belongs.
river_miasma.expired_message: The wind shifts. The fog peels off the glass and is gone.

grill_grease_fire.title: GREASE ON THE GRILL
grill_grease_fire.flavor: A line of smoke from the unattended grill. Not yet fire. Almost.
grill_grease_fire.spawn_message: The grill smolders. Nobody's watching it but you.

ongoing_per_upkeep.note: the smell sits in your apron

grill_grease_fire.expired_message: The grill cools itself. The smoke thins, then stops.

fluorescent_swarm.title: A SWARM AT THE FLUORESCENT
fluorescent_swarm.flavor: Whatever they are, they aren't moths. They tick like the light does.
fluorescent_swarm.spawn_message: A swarm gathers under the buzzing light over BOOTH 6.
fluorescent_swarm.cleared_message: A swat of cloth. They scatter. The light clicks back to its normal tick.
fluorescent_swarm.expired_message: They scatter on their own. The tick of the light returns to normal.
